decision_target: Decide which performance facts are independently replayed and which measurement choices still require discovery before CKR performance work or optimization can advance.
source_of_truth: git object database and ignored built artifacts
read_method: Use only validator-replayed observations. Preserve rejected claims as rejected, replace the contradicted allocation wording, and keep designs, row selection, rankings, and risk labels outside the accepted conclusion.

conclusion_claims.claim: HEAD is 7bf966e66b914cfe877ff5ee8d1990ca3bf3d162 and this DKR changed no tracked or cached product file.
The current manifest contains exactly 39 Lite rows and 8 Lite React rows, and its only measurement metrics are hz and p75.
The current deterministic harness passes 14 of 14 declared tests with 0 failures and collected no benchmark sample.

The manifest has no scope.run, session.run, owned-resource, or retained-memory workload row and no allocation measurement row or observation field and no retained-memory measurement row or observation field.
No executable allocation or retained-memory checker was available to validate the proposed measurement design.
The current Lite and Lite React dist artifacts are ignored, predate the exact HEAD commit, and lack a tracked exact-head clean-build provenance record.

measurement_validity.accepted_scope: Current manifest shape, exact 39 plus 8 row count, deterministic 14 of 14 harness result, missing owned and session rows, missing allocation and retained measurement fields, and ignored-dist provenance gap.
measurement_validity.throughput_target_status: blocked because no owned or SDK session workload row exists and no fresh paired target result exists
measurement_validity.allocation_target_status: blocked because no allocation measurement row or observation field and no validated allocation checker exists
measurement_validity.retained_memory_wall_status: blocked because no retained-memory measurement row or observation field and no validated retained-memory checker exists

questions_answered: The current throughput manifest size and metric kinds are replayed.
The deterministic harness result is replayed.
The absence of owned, session, allocation-measurement, and retained-memory rows or observation fields is replayed.
The current ignored dist artifacts do not prove an exact-head clean build.
questions_unanswered: Which owned and managed lifecycle workloads should become representative rows.
Whether the SDK workload should isolate session.run or include agent.turn.
Which allocation method and controls are valid under this Node runtime.
Which retained-memory method, noise bound, and denominator rule are valid.
Which source location should be attempted first and what its semantic risk is.
Which immutable-baseline procedure should be adopted after the measurement surface is validated.

items: The allocation calibration protocol proposed in checkpoint.v1.
The retained-memory protocol proposed in checkpoint.v1.
Any aggregation, weighting, fallback, noise, or denominator rule not already fixed by the frame.

missing_row_set.items: The eight exact row IDs and their representative or supplementary roles proposed in checkpoint.v1.
missing_row_set.accepted_boundary: At least one owned or scope.run row and at least one session.run or SDK session row are absent; the exact replacement set is not accepted.

candidate_order_and_risk.accepted_boundary: The six cited source ranges contain the stated operations.
candidate_order_and_risk.unaccepted_items: Ranks 1 through 6, expected effect, semantic-risk labels, and any first-candidate recommendation.

baseline_process.accepted_boundary: The current ignored dist files lack exact-head provenance.
baseline_process.unaccepted_items: The benchmark-only descendant, rebuild cadence, and artifact-freezing procedure proposed in checkpoint.v1.

result.reason: Five conclusion claims cite validator traces with decision accepted. The no-checker fact is replayed inside a trace whose broader design-validation decision is rejected, so this revised checkpoint does not self-promote it to an accepted DKR result.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: validator harness trace and command ledger
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Confirm only deterministic harness tests ran and no benchmark samples or comparison were accepted.
Require a fresh validator to confirm that v2 advances no improvement claim.
Replay a predeclared paired comparison over established rows.
Read validated allocation rows only after a checker exists.
Read validated post-close retained-memory rows only after a checker exists.
Confirm no tracked or cached product diff exists.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: lifecycle conformance evidence for a future product change
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: No product move is admissible until cleanup behavior is replayed.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: session-isolation conformance evidence for a future product change
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: No product move is admissible until sibling and nested boundary isolation is replayed.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: post-close lifecycle conformance evidence for a future product change
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: No product move is admissible until complete close and disposal is replayed.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: API and lint evidence for a future product change
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: No product move is admissible until the context-argument rule is replayed.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: graph and lint evidence for a future product change
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: No product move is admissible until changed execution edges are replayed.
Confirm the discovery worker touched no tracked or cached product surface.
Require conclusion facts to cite independent audit traces and leave v2 pending when a trace is not accepted.

active_anti_goal_verification.source_of_truth: revised checkpoint plus a fresh validator
active_anti_goal_verification.read_method: Preserve the contradicted and non-replayable findings and require independent validation of the revision.

decision: Record replayed reducing discovery, require independent validation of v2, and keep CKR performance and optimization blocked.
